final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Douyin (TikTok) live-stream screenshot featuring a young woman resembling a celestial beauty (神仙姐姐) holding a sign during a live broadcast, in 9:16 vertical format.

Style/medium: photorealistic Douyin live-stream UI screenshot
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame, streamer centered or slightly lower-center, Douyin live-stream UI overlay (viewer count, comment bar, gift animations, red heart icons, username badges) visible around the edges
Subject: a beautiful young woman (神仙姐姐 aesthetic — ethereal, fair-skinned, elegant) holding a handwritten or printed sign with both hands, facing the camera with a warm smile
Scene/backdrop: typical indoor live-stream setup — soft ring-light glow, blurred background suggesting a cozy room or studio
Lighting/mood: soft, flattering ring-light illumination, warm and welcoming atmosphere
Color palette: soft warm tones, with Douyin UI elements in black/red/white
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): sign text reads "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: Douyin live-stream UI chrome must be visible (top bar with streamer name, bottom comment input bar, floating emoji/gift icons); sign must be legible and held prominently in frame
Avoid: generic stock-photo look, missing UI overlay, blurry or illegible sign text
